name: Bladder CT
description: CT of the bladder for evaluation of bladder wall, lumen, and surrounding structures

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the pelvis was performed with axial and coronal reconstructions.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Bladder Wall
sections.content: The bladder wall demonstrates [normal thickness / no wall thickening / no focal lesion]. The wall is [smooth / not irregular].

sections.name: Bladder Lumen
sections.content: The bladder lumen is [not distended / no filling defect / no stone / no mass].

sections.name: Ureteral Orifices
sections.content: The bilateral ureteral orifices are [visualized / patent / no obstruction]. No hydroureter.

sections.name: Perivesical Space
sections.content: The perivesical soft tissues are [unremarkable / no stranding / no infiltration]. No perivesical mass.

sections.name: Pelvic Lymph Nodes
sections.content: The pelvic lymph nodes are [not enlarged / no lymphadenopathy]. No suspicious nodes.

sections.name: Prostate
sections.content: The prostate (in males) is [normal in size / no enlargement / no mass]. No abnormal density.

impression:
1. Normal CT bladder.
2. No bladder wall thickening, mass, or filling defect identified.
author: RadReport Templates
